title: Planet Labs PBC (PL) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text:
Analyst ratings for Planet Labs PBC reflect a consensus Buy rating based on nine analysts covering the company as of May 13, 2026. The analyst community maintains bullish sentiment on the company's growth prospects, profitability trajectory, and defense market opportunities. Buy consensus reflects confidence in the company's business model and execution capability.

Planet Labs is forecast to grow earnings by 33.1% per annum and revenue by 23.9% per annum, with EPS growth of 31.7% per annum. These growth rates significantly exceed historical averages and broader market expectations. The forecast reflects analyst expectations that the company will sustain rapid growth while expanding profitability.

The company's fiscal 2026 profitability achievement of $15.5 million adjusted EBITDA represents validation of the business model. Analysts expect this profitability to expand as the company scales operations and improves margins. Free cash flow of $52.9 million demonstrates the company's ability to generate cash despite capital-intensive satellite deployment activities.

Analyst forecasts support price targets averaging around $35, with a range from $20 to $40. The consensus price target reflects assumptions about backlog conversion, contract acceleration, and margin expansion. Key assumptions include successful satellite constellation deployment reaching 32 satellites, continued defense contract wins, and successful monetization of AI capabilities.

Analyst research highlights key strengths including the company's $900 million backlog, 85% contract mix weighted toward annual and multi-year agreements, and growing Defense & Intelligence segment. The NVIDIA partnership for AI processing provides competitive differentiation. Key risks cited include execution risk on satellite launches and potential changes in government defense spending.
